query: SELECT id, name FROM listings WHERE name LIKE '%Mickey%' OR name LIKE '%Ocean%' OR name LIKE '%Sea%' OR name LIKE '%Radiator%' OR name LIKE '%Escape%' OR name LIKE '%Palace%' OR name LIKE '%Comfy%' OR name LIKE '%Cozy%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 22VUNhnLtUFbAdW.root --database 9cFYW7E3ZSgdzZcVUYn2yx --execute SELECT id, name FROM listings WHERE name LIKE '%Mickey%' OR name LIKE '%Ocean%' OR name LIKE '%Sea%' OR name LIKE '%Radiator%' OR name LIKE '%Escape%' OR name LIKE '%Palace%' OR name LIKE '%Comfy%' OR name LIKE '%Cozy%';
